title: Capstone Project: Statistical Analysis of a Dataset

flashcards.definition: A specific, focused question that guides the entire statistical investigation.
The initial phase of summarizing data with statistics and visualizations before formal testing.
An outside variable that affects both the explanatory and response variables, potentially distorting the relationship.
A structured document presenting the research question, data, methods, results, and interpretation.
Acknowledging weaknesses in the study design, data quality, or scope that affect the conclusions.
